name: marketcheck-marketplace
description: Plugins by MarketCheck Inc. for automotive market intelligence, vehicle pricing, and inventory analytics.

plugins.name: marketcheck-cowork-plugin
plugins.description: Automotive market intelligence suite for dealers, appraisers, brokers, and analysts. 11 skills, 5 commands, 1 agent — powered by MarketCheck MCP server. Includes dealer onboarding, daily/weekly/monthly workflow briefings, competitive pricing, inventory analytics, market share, depreciation tracking, and deal finding. US + UK market support.
